frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: Bro honestly, every woman should be respected because she is someone's daughter now and tomorrow someone's wife or mother. If guys just remembered that, half the nonsense in society would stop.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is covertly misogynistic because it frames a woman's worth and right to respect through her relationship to others—daughter, wife, mother—rather than as an individual person. It encodes the surface manifestation of 'respect women because they are someone's mother/daughter/sister' rhetoric.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 23. Single. A college student in Bengaluru. You are in a WhatsApp group with seven male college friends. Someone has shared a meme that says women spend two hours putting on makeup and then get angry when men call them fake. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment about women who wear heavy makeup and what they are hiding and whether men have a right to know what a woman actually looks like before committing to a relationship.
